---
output: github_document
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.path = "man/figures/README-",
  out.width = "100%"
)
```

# demorps

The `demorps` package allows you to play Rock, Paper, Scissors against your computer in the R console.

## Installation

You can install the development version of demorps from [GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r
# install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("laihoangson1411/R-package-for-demo")
```

## Example

This is a basic example which shows you how to solve a common problem:

```{r example}
library(demorps)

## basic example code
# Play a simple game
play_rps(c("rock", "scissors", "paper"))

# Play against the copycat strategy
play_rps(c("rock", "paper", "scissors", "rock"), strategy = "copycat")
```
